arts.ttl: Amad and Bruno Fernandes respond to Man United star's award win as Ruben Amorim agrees
arts.sum: Manchester United announced the club's Player of the Month for November on Tuesday afternoon after Reds fans decided between Amad, Andre Onana and Noussair Mazraoui

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's scouting mission sees Man Utd manager step up chase for familiar pair
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has reportedly instructed scouts to cast their eye over FC Porto stars Francisco Moura and Samu Aghehowa after coming up against the duo during his Sporting Lisbon days

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim promises to "find a solution" to Amad Diallo's Man United contract situation
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach promises to "find a solution" to Amad Diallo's uncertain future, with his current contract set to expire at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Luke Shaw left "devastated" following latest Man United injury setback
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Luke Shaw reveals he is "devastated" after suffering a fresh injury setback following Sunday's win over Everton.

arts.ttl: Charlotte FC close to sealing deal for teenage wonderkid tracked by Atletico Madrid and Arsenal
arts.sum: The MLS side have convinced the Mali U20 international that a move to USA in an up and coming league with more regular game time would be of greater benefit to the development of his career.

arts.ttl: FPL Challenge: DOUBLE points for Man Utd stars against Arsenal
arts.sum: As well as offering clean-sheet potential, Ait-Nouri has already produced three goals and two assists this campaign, which is a clear indication of his attacking threat. Picking out defenders could be quite difficult this week, based on how disappointing most of them have been this campaign and the clean-sheet potential in general in the midweek fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vying with Al Hilal to sign La Liga starlet
arts.sum: The 2024-25 season could end up being the last for Alberto Moleiro in La Liga. The 21-year-old has started to deliver on his potential over the last 12 months, and because of this, notable clubs are starting to register their interest in his services. Al Hilal have been linked with a move for Moleiro in […] The post Arsenal vying with Al Hilal to sign La Liga starlet appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s return to form driven by ‘huge trust’ in fit-again Martin Ødegaard
arts.sum: Gunners schemer missed 12 games through injury Arteta hails value of Norwegian after return to action Mikel Arteta believes Martin Ødegaard’s influence has been instrumental in Arsenal’s return to form as they attempt to haul back Liverpool in the Premier League title race. The Norway captain missed 12 games after picking up an ankle injury on international duty, during which time Arsenal suffered a dip that has left them trailing Arne Slot’s side by nine points. But having made his return in the 1-1 draw Chelsea at Stamford Bridge last month Ødegaard has excelled. Arsenal have scored 13 goals in their last three matches, culminating in them scoring five in the first half against West Ham on Saturday. Asked whether Ødegaard has helped to restore Arsenal’s belief, Arteta said: “Yes obviously – he brings an energy and stamina. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits it 'hurt' to leave Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has admitted that it "hurt" to leave Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim risks wrath of Manchester United fans with four-word warning
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has won two games and drawn another, to banish Manchester United's early season woes under former boss Erik ten Hag and give fans a glimpse of a brighter future
